Please check the JORF (Journal officiel) on Legifrance for all minister-level appointment and termination decrees published between February 17 and March 7, 2026. Specifically, identify how many individuals were replaced in roles of ministre, ministre délégué, or secrétaire d'État, and list the names of those departing and their replacements. Pay special attention to whether Charlotte Parmentier-Lecocq was formally replaced by decree. (Agent)
